summary: Smart Prefetching and Strategy Page Performance Polish testing completed successfully. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Leaderboard with podium cards, strategy table, compact toggle, pull-to-refresh wrapper, strategy detail modal with equity curve. Alerts page loads with Live connection status. All code structure verified for skeleton loaders, TTL cache values, smart prefetch exports, and usePrefetch hook integration.
passed_tests: GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true returns 200 with mock data
Leaderboard strategies have all required metrics (sharpe_ratio, total_return, max_drawdown, win_rate, total_trades)
Leaderboard sorting works for sharpe, total_return, max_drawdown, win_rate
GET /api/leaderboard/strategies/{id}?demo=true returns strategy detail with equity curve
Strategy detail has equity_curve array with day/value structure
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap?demo=true returns user, followed_strategies, feature_flags
Bootstrap has strategies_summary with total count
Following IDs endpoint works (requires auth for non-demo)
TTL cache values documented: strategy_detail=5min, metadata=10min, alerts=30s, chart=2min
Prefetch top 3 strategies endpoint works
Prefetch individual strategy detail works
Frontend: Leaderboard page loads with podium cards (1st, 2nd, 3rd)
Frontend: Strategy table shows 8 strategies with View/Follow buttons
Frontend: Demo Mode badge shows 'Demo Mode — Mock Data'
Frontend: Compact toggle works (Default → Compact)
Frontend: Pull-to-refresh wrapper exists (data-testid='pull-to-refresh')
Frontend: Strategy detail modal opens with equity curve chart
Frontend: Detail modal shows metrics and 'Unfollow Strategy' button
Frontend: Alerts page loads with 'Live Alerts' title
Frontend: Alerts connection status shows 'Live'
Code: SkeletonLoaders.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (skeleton-chart, skeleton-stats, skeleton-alert, skeleton-podium, skeleton-leaderboard-rows, skeleton-strategy-detail)
Code: TTL_MAP has correct values (strategy_detail=5min, metadata=10min, alerts=30s, chart=2min)
Code: smartPrefetch.js exports startPrefetching, cancelPrefetching, prefetchStrategy, getCachedStrategy
Code: usePrefetch hook integrated in App.js TrackingWrapper
Code: AlertsPage uses 'List' from react-window (correct for v2.2.7)
Code: VIRTUALIZE_THRESHOLD = 20 for virtualized list activation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo mode data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Prefetching and Performance Polish features fully functional. Key components: smartPrefetch.js (prefetch engine with startPrefetching, cancelPrefetching, prefetchStrategy, getCachedStrategy), mobileCache.js (TTL cache with strategy_detail=5min, metadata=10min, alerts=30s, chart=2min), usePrefetch.js (React hook integrated in App.js TrackingWrapper), SkeletonLoaders.jsx (skeleton components with data-testid attributes), PullToRefresh.jsx (mobile pull-to-refresh), LeaderboardPage.jsx (podium, table, compact toggle, hover prefetch, offline banner), AlertsPage.jsx (virtualized list with react-window List, offline banner, cached alerts). Virtualized list activates when alert count > 20.

smart_prefetch_engine.conditions: Runs when network online, app idle (300ms), cache cold/expired, battery not low
